items.text:
Walls did not contain them, Ratleigh,
so behold: we now put Dragons to this use.

Fire will hold them. I delegate this to you,
and now I say, goodbye!

So you're telling me
he's getting away from us again?

I prefer to think of it as,
we're closing in on him!

Across the canyon,
he'll be in a place
where he has no friends,

Our status as emissaries of the King
might also mean nothing.

We'll be diplomats!
They'll spread the carpets
for us!

Before we begin our careers as diplomats,
we'll have to get out of this trap.
